nodes.label: Adaptive Icon Image
nodes.description: Android adaptive icon template placeholder — white background, light grey grid overlay, three concentric circles indicating safe zone boundaries for app icon content.

nodes.label: Adaptive Icon Safe Zone Guide
nodes.description: Visual guide showing the Android adaptive icon safe area — the innermost concentric circle marks the region guaranteed visible regardless of launcher mask shape (circle, squircle, square, etc.).

nodes.label: Android Adaptive Icon Standard
nodes.description: Android platform standard (API 26+) for adaptive icons composed of foreground and background layers, allowing launcher apps to apply different mask shapes.

nodes.label: Expo React Native Mobile App Project
nodes.description: The FitnessApp project built with Expo and React Native targeting Android and iOS. The adaptive icon is referenced in app.json under android.adaptiveIcon.foregroundImage.
nodes.norm_label: expo react native mobile app project

nodes.label: Placeholder Template Asset
nodes.description: The image contains no branding, logo, or app-specific artwork — it is a default Expo scaffold placeholder intended to be replaced with actual app icon artwork.

nodes.label: Concentric Circles Visual Motif
nodes.description: Three concentric circles rendered in light grey on white, centered in the canvas. The circles delineate the outer boundary, bleed zone, and safe/foreground zone of the adaptive icon.

nodes.label: Fitness App
nodes.description: The mobile fitness application (FitnessApp) that owns this adaptive icon asset, intended for Android deployment via Expo.

nodes.label: Splash Screen Image
nodes.description: Default Expo splash screen icon template. White background with a light grey grid overlay and three concentric circles centered on the canvas. Serves as the launch screen image for the FitnessApp mobile application.

nodes.label: Concentric Circles Motif
nodes.description: Three concentric circles rendered in light grey/silver on a white background. The outermost circle spans most of the canvas. Primary visual element of the splash icon.

nodes.label: Grid Guide Overlay
nodes.description: Light grey grid lines overlaid across the entire canvas, used as alignment and safe-zone guides typical of Expo/React Native splash screen templates.

nodes.label: Expo Default Splash Template
nodes.description: This asset matches the default Expo React Native splash-icon template, indicating the FitnessApp has not yet replaced it with a custom branded splash screen.

nodes.label: FitnessApp Mobile Application
nodes.description: The parent mobile application (FitnessApp) that owns this splash screen asset. Likely built with Expo/React Native.
